subcodes.first_line: O servant of God! We have turned unto thee from this exalted station and make mention of thee with a remembrance wherewith nothing can compare [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا عبدالله انا اقبلنا الیک من هذا المقام الرفیع و نذکرک بذکر لا یعادله شیء و
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @predictions and prophecies
